sensitivity.note: Defense/ME employers: keep real names. Generic corporate: use sanitized versions. Always ask user.

jd.title: Senior Systems Engineer — Avionics & Mission Systems

requirements.text: 10+ years in avionics systems engineering or aerospace systems integration
Experience with fighter aircraft avionics architecture and integration
Hands-on experience with mission computer, EW suite, or radar integration
Systems engineering lifecycle (requirements, design, V&V, deployment)
Experience with AEW&C, SIGINT, or ISR platforms
MS in Avionics, Systems, Electrical, or Aerospace Engineering
Knowledge of MIL-STD-1553, ARINC 429, or similar avionics bus standards
Flight test support and weapons integration experience
Technical documentation and design review experience

responsibilities: Lead avionics systems engineering for fighter aircraft modernization programs
Define requirements, perform functional analysis, and manage system baselines
Coordinate integration testing of mission systems, sensors, and weapons
Support flight test campaigns and analyze test data
Interface with customer engineering teams and subcontractors
Produce technical documentation for design reviews and certification

expected_output.summary: Avionics Systems Engineer with 16+ years spanning hands-on integration at PAC Kamra, SAAB 2000 Erieye AEW&C maintenance, and JF-17 Thunder Block III development at CADI Chengdu. Deep expertise in mission computer integration, EW suite design, glass cockpit systems, and weapons qualification. MS Avionics Engineering with cross-cultural engineering collaboration experience across Pakistan, China, and Sweden.

experience.title: Aerospace Systems Integration Lead
bullets: Led avionics and weapons systems integration for JF-17 Thunder Block III development at CADI
Managed integration testing of indigenous mission computer, EW suite, and glass cockpit systems
Supported flight test campaigns for weapons integration and avionics qualification
Contributed to development of JF-17's indigenous systems replacing legacy Chinese/Russian components
Bridged cross-cultural engineering collaboration between Pakistani and Chinese technical teams

experience.title: Integrated Systems & Design Specialist
bullets: Designed and integrated avionics subsystems for military aircraft platforms at PAC Kamra
Performed system-level testing, verification, and validation of integrated avionics suites
Developed technical documentation for design reviews, configuration baselines, and test procedures
Supported production line engineering for avionics installation and wiring harness integration

experience.title: Maintenance Support Engineer, AEW&C Aircraft
bullets: Managed maintenance engineering for SAAB 2000 Erieye AEW&C fleet (9 aircraft) including radar and mission systems
Performed technical fault diagnosis at system and subsystem level
Ensured operational readiness through maintenance scheduling and resource allocation

experience.title: Faculty — Systems Engineering
bullets: Teaches Systems Engineering courses to aeronautical engineering students
Coordinates research projects and industry-academia linkages

certifications: Introduction to Systems Engineering Specialization — CU Boulder / Lockheed Martin
education: BE Avionics Engineering — College of Aeronautical Engineering, PAF (2004-2008)

jd_requirements: mission computer EW suite radar integration

provenance.notes: Real user career data. JDs modeled from real defense/aerospace postings. User snap-checked during creation session. Expected outputs derived from verified ground truth profile.
